categories.label: CIF Issue Items (Must Be CIF Issue)

items.name: Field Load Carrying (FLC)
items.description: CIF issue Fighting Load Carrier.

items.name: Canteen, 1 QT
items.description: CIF issue one-quart canteen.

items.name: Cover, Canteen 1 QT
items.description: CIF issue cover for one-quart canteen.

items.name: Pouch, Small Arms (M4 Mag Pouch)
items.description: CIF issue small arms magazine pouch. Must hold at least 6 magazines on the FLC.
items.notes: MUST HOLD AT LEAST 6 MAGS ON FLC.
items.whyNeeded: Required to carry the minimum number of magazines during all tactical events.

items.name: Frame, MOLLE Pack (with Cut Away Shoulder Straps)
items.description: CIF issue MOLLE pack frame with cut-away shoulder straps.
items.notes: CIF issue. Must have cut-away shoulder straps.

items.name: Pack, MOLLE, Large
items.description: CIF issue large MOLLE pack.

items.name: Assault Pack (ACU or OCP Pattern)
items.description: CIF issue assault pack in ACU or OCP pattern.

items.name: Bag, Waterproof
items.description: CIF issue waterproof bag.

items.name: Canteen, 2 QT
items.description: CIF issue two-quart canteen.

items.name: Cover, Canteen 2 QT
items.description: CIF issue cover for two-quart canteen.

items.name: Carrier, Entrenching Tool
items.description: CIF issue e-tool carrier.

items.name: Entrenching Tool (E-Tool)
items.description: CIF issue folding e-tool.

items.name: Sleeping Mat
items.description: CIF issue sleeping mat.

items.name: Stuff Sack
items.description: CIF issue stuff sack.

items.name: Sleep Set — Inner Bag
items.description: CIF issue sleep set inner (summer) bag.

items.name: Sleep Set — Outer Bag
items.description: CIF issue sleep set outer (winter) bag. Required October through March. See Note 6.
items.notes: See Note 6. Cold weather gear required during October through March classes.

items.name: GORE-TEX Bivy Cover
items.description: CIF issue GORE-TEX bivy cover.

items.name: Poncho Liner (Woobie)
items.description: CIF issue poncho liner.

items.name: Poncho (Camouflage) / Issued Tarp
items.description: CIF issue camouflage poncho or issued tarp.

items.name: Bag, Barracks
items.description: CIF issue barracks/laundry bag.

items.name: Bag, Duffel or Aviators Kit Bag
items.description: CIF issue duffel bag or aviators kit bag.
items.notes: No student will load the truck with more than 1 rucksack and 2 Aviators kit or duffle bags.

items.name: CamelBak (100 oz., Black/Green/ACU/OCP Pattern)
items.description: CIF issue CamelBak hydration carrier, 100 oz. bladder, in black, green, ACU, or OCP pattern.
items.notes: BLACK, GREEN, ACU, or OCP PATTERN ONLY. 100 oz. bladder.

items.name: OCP/Multicam Patrol Cap
items.description: OCP/Multicam patrol cap with Cat Eyes, Name Tape, and VS-17 panel sewn on.
items.notes: Cat Eyes (luminous tape), Name Tape, AND VS-17 panel must be sewn onto patrol cap before arriving.
items.selectionTips: Sew on the VS-17 panel (in addition to the standard cat eyes and nametape) before arriving.

items.name: OCP/Multicam Top
items.description: OCP/Multicam blouse with rank, name tag, US Army, and unit patch.
items.notes: Each uniform must have rank, name tag, US Army, and unit patch. Additional skill badges and tabs may be worn at individual discretion.

items.name: OCP/Multicam Trousers
items.description: OCP/Multicam trousers.

items.name: T-Shirt (Must Match Boots and Belt)
items.description: Military T-shirt. Color must match boots and belt.
items.notes: MUST MATCH BOOTS AND BELT. T-Shirts with printed logos or designs are prohibited.
items.selectionTips: Coordinate color (tan or brown) to match your boots and belt.

items.name: PCU Level 1 — Silk Weight Base Layer
items.description: PCU Level 1 silk weight underwear (tops and bottoms). Required October through March.
items.notes: 1 set. See Note 6 — cold weather gear required October through March classes.

items.name: PCU Level 2 — Waffle Weight Base Layer
items.description: PCU Level 2 waffle weight underwear (tops and bottoms). Required October through March.
items.notes: 1 set. See Note 6 — cold weather gear required October through March classes.

items.name: PCU Level 3 — Fleece Jacket (Green or Brown)
items.description: PCU Level 3 fleece jacket in green or brown. Required October through March.
items.notes: Green or brown only. See Note 6 — cold weather gear required October through March classes.

items.name: PCU Level 6 — GORE-TEX Parka
items.description: PCU Level 6 GORE-TEX parka. If unavailable, OCP-specific cold weather gear or GORE-SEAM equivalent may substitute. See Note 3.
items.notes: See Note 3. If GORE-TEX is not available, the Army issue wet weather suit will replace it. OCP specific cold weather gear will replace old style GORE-TEX. Gear that says 'GORE-SEAM' is also authorized and equivalent to 'GORE TEX'.

items.name: PCU Level 6 — GORE-TEX Trousers
items.description: PCU Level 6 GORE-TEX trousers. If unavailable, OCP-specific cold weather gear or GORE-SEAM equivalent may substitute. See Note 3.
items.notes: See Note 3. Same substitution rules as GORE-TEX parka.

items.name: PT T-Shirt, Army Short Sleeve (Black)
items.description: Army issue short sleeve PT shirt in black.

items.name: PT T-Shirt, Army Long Sleeve (Black)
items.description: Army issue long sleeve PT shirt in black.

items.name: PT Trunks, Army (Gold Letters)
items.description: Army issue PT trunks (shorts) with gold letters.

items.name: PT Pants, Army (Black)
items.description: Army issue PT pants in black.

items.name: PT Jacket, Army (Black)
items.description: Army issue PT jacket in black.

items.name: Reflective Belt
items.description: Standard reflective safety belt.

items.name: Socks, Wool (Green or Black)
items.description: Wool socks in green or black. See Note 4 — students will have limited shopette access; bring enough to last the duration.
items.notes: 6 pairs. Green or black only. See Note 4 — bring enough to last the course duration.

items.name: Belt, Tan or Brown (Must Match Boots and T-Shirt)
items.description: Tan or brown belt. Color must match boots and T-shirt.
items.selectionTips: Coordinate color with your boots and t-shirt.

items.name: Boots
items.description: US Army issued/approved boots. No desert hot weather, no desert intermediate cold (insulated 200g). No alterations except sole replacement (waffle soles). Must be above the ankle, no zippers or hook/pile fasteners.
items.notes: See Note 1. Only US Army issued/approved boots. Desert Hot Weather and desert Intermediate Cold Boots (insulated 200g) authorized. Boots may not be altered except for sole replacement (waffle soles). Must be above ankle. No zipper or hook/pile fasteners.

items.name: Gloves, Leather (Black or Green — NO WHITE)
items.description: Leather gloves in black or green. White leather gloves are NOT authorized.
items.notes: Black or Green ONLY. NO WHITE.

items.name: Inserts, Glove (Green or Black Wool)
items.description: Wool glove inserts in green or black.

items.name: Watch Cap
items.description: Military issue watch cap. Required October through March. See Note 6.
items.notes: See Note 6 — cold weather gear required October through March classes.

items.name: ID Card (CAC)
items.description: Military ID card (CAC). Must confirm working SOCOM NIPR account. Must NOT expire during the duration of the class.
items.notes: CONFIRM WORKING SOCOM NIPR ACCOUNT BY SIGNING INTO A COMPUTER BEFORE ARRIVING. ID CARD MUST NOT EXPIRE DURING THE DURATION OF THE CLASS.
items.selectionTips: Verify your CAC is valid and your SOCOM NIPR account is working before arriving.

items.name: ID Tags (Dog Tags) with Breakaway Chain
items.description: Military dog tags with breakaway chain. One set worn while in OCPs.

items.name: Medical Alert Tags or Bracelet
items.description: Medical alert identification if applicable.

categories.label: Additional Mandatory Items (Military or Civilian Authorized)

items.name: Notebook with Pen and Pencil (Sterile)
items.description: Sterile (blank) notebooks in two sizes: large (min 6"x9") and small (min 3"x5"). Pens and pencils included.
items.notes: MUST BE STERILE (blank) upon arrival. Large: minimum 6x9 inches. Small: minimum 3x5 inches.

items.name: Razors with Blades (3-Week Supply)
items.description: Shaving razors with blades. Minimum 3 for a 3-week supply.

items.name: Toothbrush with Toothpaste
items.description: Toothbrush with toothpaste. 3-week supply.

items.name: Soap
items.description: Bar or liquid soap. 3-week supply.

items.name: Deodorant
items.description: Deodorant. 3-week supply.

items.name: Shaving Cream
items.description: Shaving cream. 3-week supply.

items.name: Prescription Medication
items.description: Prescription medications as needed. Must notify cadre during layout.
items.notes: NOTIFY CADRE DURING LAYOUT. As needed.

items.name: Running Shoes (Serviceable)
items.description: Serviceable running shoes for PT.

items.name: Shower Shoes
items.description: Shower shoes/flip-flops.

items.name: Towels
items.description: Standard bath towels.

items.name: Washcloths
items.description: Standard washcloths.

items.name: PT Socks (White or Black, IAW AR 670-1)
items.description: White or black PT socks in accordance with AR 670-1.
items.notes: White or black only. IAW AR 670-1.

items.name: Wristwatch (No GPS or Smart Watches)
items.description: Durable wristwatch. No GPS or smart watches (including activity trackers). See Note 5.
items.notes: NO GPS OR WIRELESS DATA TRANSFER CAPABLE WRISTWATCHES. THIS INCLUDES ACTIVITY TRACKERS.
items.selectionTips: Simple digital watch only — no Garmin, Apple Watch, Fitbit, or similar.

items.name: Headlamp with Red Lens
items.description: Headlamp with red lens capability.
items.notes: Must have red lens. Bring extra batteries for all equipment.

items.name: Weapons Cleaning Kit (Small Arms)
items.description: Complete small arms weapons cleaning kit. Must be able to clean the entire weapon.
items.notes: Must be able to clean ENTIRE weapon.

items.name: Laundry Soap (Liquid Only)
items.description: Liquid laundry soap only.
items.notes: LIQUID ONLY. No powder or pods.

items.name: Extra Batteries
items.description: Extra set of batteries for all equipment.

items.name: Eye Protection, Ballistic (Clear, ANSI Z87.1 or better)
items.description: Ballistic eye protection, clear lens, ANSI Z87.1 or better standard.
items.notes: Clear lens only. ANSI Z87.1 or better.

items.name: Ear Protection
items.description: Standard ear protection.

items.name: Eyeglasses, Military with Elastic Retainer
items.description: Military prescription eyeglasses with elastic retainer. Required if you have a military prescription. Contact lenses will NOT be worn.
items.notes: 2 pairs if required. Contact lenses will NOT be worn.

items.name: Map Case with Map Markers
items.description: Clear map case with alcohol map markers.

items.name: Cash
items.description: Exactly $50 cash.
items.notes: $50. Students will have limited shopette access — bring enough toiletries and tobacco products to last the course duration.

items.name: Debit Card or Credit Card
items.description: Personal debit or credit card.

items.name: Insignia / Patches / Rank
items.description: Extra sets of rank, insignia, and patches.

items.name: Camo Stick or Compact
items.description: Military camouflage face paint (stick or compact).

items.name: SHARP Essay (Physical and Digital Copy)
items.description: SHARP (Sexual Harassment/Assault Response and Prevention) essay. One physical copy and one digital copy required.
items.whyNeeded: Required administrative document for all BLC students.

items.name: Lighter
items.description: Standard disposable lighter.

items.name: 1-Gallon Zip Lock Bag (Last Name Written on Front)
items.description: One-gallon zip lock bag with soldier's last name written on the front.
items.notes: Write LAST NAME on the front. Cell phones and chargers will be turned in Day-1 and placed in this bag in secure storage.
items.whyNeeded: Cell phones will be placed in this bag on Day 1 and locked in secure storage.
items.selectionTips: Write your last name clearly on the outside before arriving.

items.name: Whistle
items.description: Standard safety whistle.

items.name: OCP/Multicam Boonie Cap
items.description: OCP/Multicam boonie hat.

items.name: Padlock
items.description: Padlock for securing gear and storage.

items.name: Pillow
items.description: Personal pillow for quarters.

items.name: Twin Size Sheet (Fitted or Unfitted)
items.description: Twin size bed sheet for quarters bunk.

items.name: Lifting Shoes / Lifting Belt
items.description: Weightlifting shoes and/or belt.
items.notes: As needed. BLC includes physical training.

items.name: Coffee
items.description: Coffee. Coffee maker is available in quarters.
items.notes: Coffee maker is available in quarters.

items.name: Theragun or Equivalent Recovery Device
items.description: Percussion massage device for muscle recovery.

items.name: 550 Paracord
items.description: Nylon 550 paracord.

items.name: Alarm Clock
items.description: Small alarm clock. Wind-up or battery powered. No plug-in or clock radios.
items.notes: Small, wind-up or battery powered. NO PLUG-IN OR RADIOS.

items.name: Alcohol Pens and Erasers
items.description: Alcohol-based markers and erasers for map overlays.

items.name: Highlighter
items.description: Highlighter markers.

items.name: Balaclava / Neck Gaiter
items.description: Balaclava or neck gaiter for cold weather.

items.name: Black Electrical Tape and/or 100 MPH Tape (Green/Brown)
items.description: Black electrical tape and/or 100 MPH tape in green or brown.

items.name: Intermediate Cold Weather Boots
items.description: Intermediate cold weather boots (insulated 200g), US Army issue/approved. See Note 1.
items.notes: See Note 1. Recommended for October–March classes.

items.name: Butt Pack / Extra Pouches (Standard Issue Only)
items.description: Military issue butt pack or additional pouches. Must be standard issue.

items.name: Chewing Gum (Non-Caffeinated)
items.description: Non-caffeinated chewing gum.

items.name: Flashlight
items.description: Handheld flashlight.

items.name: Hair Trimmer, Electric
items.description: Electric hair trimmer.

items.name: Knee Pads and Elbow Pads
items.description: Protective knee and elbow pads.

items.name: Knife (Max Blade 3 inches)
items.description: Folding or pocket knife with max blade length of 3 inches.

items.name: Leatherman Multi-Tool
items.description: Leatherman or equivalent multi-tool.

items.name: Tactical Gloves (Nomex, Shooting, or Tactical)
items.description: Nomex, shooting, or tactical style gloves.

items.name: Pace Count Cord (Ranger Beads)
items.description: 100-meter pace count cord.

items.name: Field Jacket Liner
items.description: Military field jacket liner.

items.name: Clothes Hangers
items.description: Standard clothes hangers for quarters.

items.name: Clothes-Line Pins
items.description: Clothes pins for drying gear.

items.name: Carabiners, Subdued (Not for Rappelling)
items.description: Subdued color carabiners. NOT authorized for rappelling.

items.name: Underwear
items.description: Additional underwear.

items.name: Wrist Compass
items.description: Wrist-mounted compass.

items.name: Foot Powder
items.description: Foot powder for blister and fungus prevention.

items.name: Insect Repellent / Chigg-Away
items.description: Insect repellent including Chigg-Away. Military or civilian.

items.name: Chapstick / Lip Balm (Highly Recommended)
items.description: Lip balm.

items.name: Sunscreen (Highly Recommended)
items.description: Sunscreen.

items.name: Zip Lock Bags
items.description: Assorted zip lock bags.

items.name: Reading Material (Professional, Military, or Academic)
items.description: Professional, military, or academic reading material.
items.notes: As needed. Professional, military, or academic only.

items.name: Feminine Wipes / Baby Wipes (Unscented)
items.description: Unscented feminine or baby wipes.

items.name: Women's Personal Hygiene Items
items.description: Personal hygiene items for female students.

items.name: Weapons Sling
items.description: Rifle sling for assigned weapon.

items.name: Protractor
items.description: Military protractor for map reading.

items.name: Civilian Rucksack (Tactical Taylor Style)
items.description: Tactical-style civilian rucksack.

items.name: Q-Tips
items.description: Cotton swabs.

items.name: Weapons Cleaning Rags
items.description: Cleaning rags for weapons maintenance.

items.name: Cell Phone (Turned in Day 1)
items.description: Cell phones and chargers will be turned in Day-1 and placed in secure storage in a zip lock bag with soldier's last name. Students will not have any supplements.
items.notes: Cell phones will be turned in Day-1 and placed in secure storage. Students should bring a 1-gallon zip lock bag with last name written on front.

items.name: Nicotine Products
items.description: All nicotine products are prohibited.

items.name: Protein Powder / Supplements
items.description: All protein powder and supplements of any type are prohibited. Students will not have any supplements.

items.name: Under Armour / Athletic T-Shirts
items.description: Under Armour type T-shirts and T-shirts with printed logos or designs are prohibited.

items.name: Electronic Devices (MP-3, iPods, E-Cigs, Cameras, Laptops, GPS Watches, Activity Trackers)
items.description: Electronic devices including MP-3 players, iPods, E-CIGS, cameras, voice recorders, GPS watches, laptops, E-Readers, activity trackers, and any media storage devices are prohibited.
items.notes: Includes: MP-3 players, iPods, E-CIGS, Cameras, Voice recorders, GPS Watches, laptops, E-Readers, Activity Trackers, and any media storage devices.

items.name: Civilian GPS Units
items.description: No civilian GPS units of any kind.
